signals.headline: Bitcoin and Ethereum Rally with BTC at $78,794 (+4
signals.raw:
Bitcoin and Ethereum Rally with BTC at $78,794 (+4.3%) and ETH at $2,399 (+3.4%) Amid ETF Inflows and Trump Iran Ceasefire Extension | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][2]

Bitcoin hit $78,000 and Ethereum surged alongside XRP and Dogecoin following President Trump's extension of the Iran ceasefire, triggering $330M in liquidations and a sharp rally.[2][3] Ether specifically climbed 3.4% to $2,399.44 as

signals.headline: Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Fed Chair to Succeed Jerome Powell** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][5]
signals.raw:
Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Fed Chair to Succeed Jerome Powell** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][5]

President Trump announced the nomination of former Fed Governor Kevin Warsh to replace Jerome Powell as Federal Reserve chair on Friday via Truth Social, with Powell's term expiring in May 2026[1][2][3][5]. Powell has stated he will remain in his role until a successor is confirmed by the Senate a
matched_markets: Will Powell say "Successor" during April press conference?
